reference: Hello. This finding is always a positive indicator. The report of tuberculosis is given only if certain cells are seen on the slides. text: Hello, this finding is always a positive indicator; the report of tuberculosis is given only if certain cells are seen on the slides, so please proceed with the appropriate treatment as your daughter is at a growing age. She needs treatment: a high-protein diet, multivitamin syrups, and plenty of playtime.
